title: HerbariumSpecimen
description: Structured data extracted from a herbarium specimen label.

collectionName.description: Full name of the source collection, herbarium, and/or museum.

specimenIdentifier.description: Museum accession, catalog number, or other identifier assigned to the specimen.

collectorFieldNumber.description: Identifier given by the collector in the field, usually a number.

scientificName.description: Scientific name without authorship, preferring the most recent determination if multiple are present.

scientificNameAuthorship.description: Author citation for the scientificName, and year if available.

identifiedBy.description: Name(s) of the person(s) who determined the scientific name, often indicated by 'det.', 'determ.', or 'conf.'. Use the most recent determination if multiple are present. Separate multiple names with a semicolon.

dateIdentified.description: Year or full date of the (most recent) determination.

family.description: Scientific family name if explicitly stated on the label, typically ending in 'aceae' or 'ae'.

eventDateInterpretation.description: Interpretation of the collection date, in one of the following formats: 'YYYY-MM-DD', 'YYYY-MM', or'YYYY'. None if this cannot be determined.

localityDescription.description: Full locality description, preserving original wording and language. May include country, region, site name, and/or directions.

country.description: Country name, which may be a historical or non-English.

countryInterpretation.description: Current, interpreted non-verbatim country name in English.

stateProvince.description: State, province, department, or equivalent first-level administrative unit.

municipality.description: Municipality, county, district, or equivalent second-level administrative unit.

coordinates.description: Verbatim coordinate string including punctuation - may be in a modern or historical format.

coordinateSystemInterpretation.description: Interpretation of the coordinate system used, e.g. 'UTM', 'WGS84', or such. None if this cannot be determined.

elevation.description: Elevation or altitude including units if available.

habitat.description: Habitat description, vegetation community, substrate, microhabitat, or such.

recordedBy.description: Name(s) of the collector(s), often indicated by 'leg.', 'Coll.', or similar. Separate multiple names with a semicolon.

occurrenceRemarks.description: Descriptive notes about the specimen, occurrence, or collecting event.

nonWildInterpretation.description: Interpretation of wildness: True if the specimen was collected from a cultivated plant or botanic garden. False if collected from a wild population. None if this cannot be determined.

typeStatus.description: Taxonomic type designation, such as TYPE, holotype, ISOLECTOTYPE, etc.

typeName.description: Scientific name of the type species. Can be different from the scientificName. Usually shown in combination with typeStatus.

chemicalNotes.description: Chemical analysis notes, such as thallus reactions, TLC/chemistry labels, etc.
